sourceTitle: Guidelines | AI Hub - StaffNet - The University of Manchester
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Submitting work created by Generative AI as their own, or to misrepresent their understanding of the subject, is plagiarism and will be dealt with in accordance with the University's Academic Malpractice Procedure.
